overall.description: A first-person perspective of someone walking along a narrow dirt trail through a dense forest at night, illuminated by a warm flashlight. The footage shows continuous forward movement past vegetation and trees with very low visibility beyond the light's reach.

events.description: large rock on right side passes out of view behind camera

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest path, flashlight illuminating the ground ahead

entered.detail: large light-colored boulder sitting beside the trail on the right
narrow dirt trail covered with pine needles and leaves
dense green underbrush lining the left side of the path
vegetation and small plants on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a first-person walk along a dark forest trail illuminated by a warm flashlight. A large boulder sits prominently on the right side of the path, which the walker passes by mid-segment. The trail is narrow with dense vegetation on both sides and pine needles covering the ground.

agents.ego_description: continuing deeper into the forest, path curving slightly to the right

entered.detail: tall pine trees becoming visible in the flashlight beam ahead

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the forest, the large rock is now behind as the trail continues through denser vegetation. The flashlight reveals more tree trunks ahead, and the path appears to curve slightly while remaining surrounded by dark forest on all sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a narrow forest trail that moves from an open path past a landmark into deeper, more enclosed vegetation. It begins with a walk through a dark forest where a warm flashlight illuminates a ground covered in pine needles and dense greenery. As the camera advances, it passes a large, prominent boulder sitting on the right side of the path. The scene then shifts as the rock recedes behind the viewer and the trail curves slightly, drawing the camera deeper into the woods. Finally, the flashlight reveals an increasing density of tree trunks that crowd the path, further enclosing the surroundings in darkness.
